spec_match.rationale: Demo exercises the core API surface — every title keyword (access, origin, policy, storage) and 10 summary keywords appear directly in the page.

interactive.rationale: There is a try-it button and some script logic, but the interactive surface is minimal (2 form controls) — adding a live readout or more parameters would push it past the bar.

blurb_alignment.rationale: Feature-index blurb and concept lede share 8 keywords; the page delivers what the index promises.

edge_cases.rationale: Page feature-detects the API and shows both the supported and unsupported branches (try/catch + missing-API messaging).

references.rationale: Page links to https://chromestatus.com/feature/5169937372676096 directly in the see-also / references section.

design_system.rationale: All colours flow through CSS variables, no raw hex, and button overrides keep colour and background in sync.

openQuestions.title: Expand the interactive surface
openQuestions.detail: The page has the bones of an interactive demo but only 2 controls. Add another axis the user can vary (a second parameter, a different input mode, or an explicit before/after toggle) and route the result into a visible readout.

summary: Solid concept page: 5 of 6 rubric criteria pass, no fails. Minor follow-ups left as open questions.
